overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the sunny streets of Night City, crossing intersections and walking under elevated highways. The scene features futuristic cyberpunk architecture, digital billboards, steam vents, and light pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway overpasses

events.description: skateboarder crosses the path from right to left in front of the character
entering covered area beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking across a crosswalk at an urban intersection, heading toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: woman with pink hair walking ahead of the character
skateboarder performing a trick while crossing the street

entered.detail: Multi-level concrete highway structure with massive support pillars spanning the intersection
Large illuminated advertisement screen displaying commercial content on building facade
Metal scaffolding structure surrounding a building corner at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a sunny urban sidewalk and crosses a crosswalk at a futuristic intersection dominated by elevated highway overpasses. A skateboarder crosses the path, and the character approaches the shadow of the overpass structure.

events.description: passing by utility dumpsters and graffiti-covered concrete walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing industrial buildings and graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: man in red cap walking in the same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: Gray concrete building with metal ventilation grates and industrial architecture
Concrete wall covered in colorful cyberpunk-style graffiti art
Large industrial waste containers with blue lids

segments.scene_description: Walking under the massive concrete overpass in a semi-covered corridor, the character passes a gray industrial building with graffiti-covered walls and utility dumpsters. The lighting shifts to dappled shadows cast by the overhead highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching major intersection with distinctive architecture

events.description: exiting the covered area back into open sunlight
slight left turn to follow the sidewalk curve toward the main intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk toward a busy intersection with a distinctive geometric skyscraper visible ahead

entered.detail: Tall futuristic building with distinctive red and gold geometric pattern facade and vertical structure
Industrial ground vent emitting white steam into the air
Low-rise yellow commercial building with green trim at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into bright sunlight, the character walks toward a major intersection dominated by a striking geometric skyscraper. Steam rises from street vents, and the sidewalk curves slightly left toward the busy crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, signaling pedestrians to cross
beginning to cross the intersection crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then crossing the street with other pedestrians as the traffic light changes

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection

entered.detail: Vertical traffic signal pole with illuminated green light
Large digital billboard displaying 'JESSE' advertisement with portrait
Massive concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway above the intersection

segments.scene_description: At the busy intersection, the character waits for the traffic light to change from red to green, then crosses the street with other pedestrians. The geometric skyscraper looms large ahead, while digital billboards and overpass structures frame the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban district that transitions from the open street into the shadows of an overpass before emerging toward a towering geometric skyscraper. It begins on a bright sidewalk as the character crosses a futuristic intersection, passing a skateboarder while moving toward the looming concrete structure of an elevated highway. As the camera enters the semi-covered corridor beneath the overpass, the lighting shifts to dappled shadows against graffiti-covered industrial walls and utility dumpsters. The scene then opens back into brilliant sunlight, gliding past rising steam vents as the sidewalk curves toward a major crossing. Finally, the camera follows the character as they wait for a traffic light to change and merge with other pedestrians, crossing the street under the gaze of digital billboards and the massive geometric skyscraper.
